name: Launchpad
description: Launchpad — Canonical's code hosting and collaboration platform for Ubuntu and Linux OSS projects with PPA support.

seo.title: Launchpad — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: Launchpad: Launchpad — Canonical's code hosting and collaboration platform for Ubuntu and Linux OSS projects with PPA support.

when_to_use: Ubuntu PPA hosting for custom deb package distribution
Canonical-hosted CI builds for Linux OSS projects
Bug tracker and merge proposals for Ubuntu packages
Translation and documentation platform for OSS projects

pros: PPA system is still unbeatable for Ubuntu distribution
Integrated bug tracker, translations, code hosting
Free for OSS with no vendor lock-in
Native to Ubuntu, trusted by maintainers
cons: UI is straight out of 2008 and rarely updated
Bazaar legacy means Git support is second-class
Outside Ubuntu ecosystem, almost no one uses it
review.verdict: Essential if you ship Ubuntu PPAs, awkward and dated for anything else.
review.best_for: Ubuntu package maintainers and OSS projects tightly coupled to Canonical.
review.not_for: Modern Git-centric teams unrelated to Ubuntu.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
